extension.summary: Lightweight Kolop skin with smaller home rows
Odlahceny Kolop skin s mensimi home riadkami
Odlehceny Kolop skin s mensimi home radky
extension.description: A lite Kodi skin for Kolop focused on faster startup, smaller home rows, and CSFD-sorted movies and series through the lite addons.
Odlahceny Kodi skin pre Kolop zamerany na rychlejsi start, mensie home riadky a filmy so serialmi zoradenymi podla CSFD cez lite addony.
Odlehceny Kodi skin pro Kolop zamereny na rychlejsi start, mensi home radky a filmy se serialy serazenymi podle CSFD pres lite addony.
extension.news: v1.0.2 (2026-04-08) - Reworked Skin Settings so the visible Kolop and Stream Cinema options match the active Lite home sections - Unified the autoscroll setting key across the Lite skin so the Auto Scroll toggle affects the related list, poster, fanart and PVR views consistently v1.0.1 (2026-04-08) - Enabled the CSFD section by default on first start in the Lite skin v1.0.0 (2026-04-08) - Added a Lite skin variant that keeps the core Kolop sections but trims the active home rows - Reduced home row limits to 15 items and removed the newest-added rows from the default home flow - Switched the skin integration to the dedicated Kolop Lite and CSFD Lite addons
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
